title: Ice and Fire Black Ash
description: Renames the "Ash" block from Ice and Fire to "Black Ash" for better compatibility between Ice and Fire and other mods that add ash like Supplementaries.
body:
Renames the "Ash" block from the Ice and Fire mod to "Black Ash" for better compatibility with other mods that add ash like Supplementaries.

It is currently only available for the English US translation of Ice and Fire.
